description: Share-export eval: noisy embedded script content should still surface orchestrator overreach when transcript-like strings indicate redundant discovery, direct multi-file edits, and missing planner/gate steps.

shareExport.html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><body><script>self.$R=self.$R||[];window.__NOISE__={title:"OpenCode",summary:"marketing copy only",labels:["theme","routing","dashboard"],cards:[{message:"welcome back"},{message:"release notes"}],metrics:["coverage 92","confidence medium"]};($R[1],$R[7]={sessionID:"ses_noisy_share",shareID:"noisyShare",session:[{id:"ses_noisy_share",agent:"orchestrator"}],messages:[{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: delegate discovery to explorer"},{role:"assistant",content:"explorer: discover 8 files across routing docs"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: read 6 files to double-check everything after explorer"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: edit 3 files with direct patch"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: implement non-trivial multi-file update 3 files material"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: complete material rollout"}],notes:["ignore visual chrome","no transcript beyond this point"]});</script></body></html>
